narrative:
Roundhead (precinct in Hardin County) has 427 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.4 percentage points.
